headline: Claar Advisors Initiates Stake in Callaway as Golf Equipment Demand Remains Strong
summary: Claar Advisors opened a new position in Callaway, a leading golf equipment company known for its clubs, balls, and apparel. With golf participation remaining steady, investors are watching whether new product launches can continue to drive equipment upgrades and earnings.

headline: SoFi (SOFI), Mastercard (MA) Partner to Integrate SoFiUSD Stablecoin for Global Settlement
summary: SoFi Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:SOFI) is one of the stocks that should double in 3 years. On March 3, SoFi Technologies and Mastercard (NYSE:MA) announced an enhanced partnership to integrate SoFiUSD as a settlement option across Mastercard’s global payments network. SoFiUSD is a fully reserved US dollar stablecoin and represents the first such asset offered by […]

headline: 'E-shaped' economy is replacing a K-shaped one in 2026, economist says: The middle class is 'spending in a nervous way' now
summary: Economist Heather Long says the U.S. economy is diverging into three tiers of consumer behavior instead of two, amid an ongoing affordability crisis.

headline: Mastercard: Not Cheap, But Cheap Enough
summary: Mastercard (MA) trades near a decade-low valuation as revenue/EPS surges. Q4/25 revenue is up 17.6% and EPS up 24.2% year-over-year. See more details here.
